name: trailblaze-playwright-native-tools
description: TypeScript tooling for the playwright-native example pack. Per-pack package.json + tsconfig.json so authors get IDE autocomplete on @trailblaze/scripting types when editing flat per-file Tier-1 tool sources in this directory. The `@trailblaze/scripting` `file:` link below assumes the canonical Trailblaze repo layout — the SDK sits at the repo's sdks/typescript directory, reachable via the relative path encoded in the dependency value. If a pack is copied to a workspace with a different layout, retarget the link accordingly (npm/bun resolve `file:` paths against the package.json's own directory).
